0.content: You are in a small room with a hardwood floor and four wooden walls. It is plain and quiet — a good place to try moving, looking, and talking to objects.

1.content: A red rubber ball sits in the room. Agents can look at it for a closer description or interact with it on a turn.

2.content: A wooden sign is posted in the room. Looking at it reveals whatever text the game master has written on it.
